# Obligatory Mermaid Architecture Documentation

## Purpose

Ensure architecture documentation includes complete, current Mermaid diagrams aligned with real code structure.

## Minimum Required Diagrams

1. High-level system context diagram.
2. Component/module interaction diagram.
3. Runtime flow diagram for key user/service paths.

## Standards

- Keep diagram nodes aligned with actual package/module/service names.
- Update Mermaid diagrams whenever architecture-relevant code changes.
- Prefer these Mermaid types:
  - `flowchart`
  - `sequenceDiagram`
  - `classDiagram`
  - `graph TD` / `graph LR`

## Update Checklist

- Context, component, and runtime diagrams all present.
- Diagram labels match real implementation names.
- Any changed architecture path reflected in diagrams and narrative.
